ops.title: cc-guides v3: layout.toml composition — fragments in .claude/fragments, shared guides imported from cc-skills; binary+GHA in cc-guides, content+fan-out in cc-skills
ops.body:
cc-guides v3 (layout composition), live fleet-wide 2026-07-10. Supersedes the v1 embed/.src design and the older repo-bootstrap _partials stamp/sync.

**Split**: cc-guides = framework only — the Go binary (brew `yasyf/tap/cc-guides`, auto-release v0.1.<run#> on every main push) and the importable GHA (`yasyf/cc-guides@action-v1` check + reusable `re-render.yml`). cc-skills = content home — `guides/md/*.md` + `guides/sh/*.sh` canonical shared fragments, root `fleet.json` roster (21 repos; cc-skills itself NOT a member yet), and `.github/workflows/guides-fan-out.yml`: push touching `guides/**`/`fleet.json` → `cc-guides lint guides/` purity gate → `repository_dispatch cc-guides-render` to the whole roster (secret FLEET_DISPATCH_TOKEN, currently a gh CLI token).

**Per-repo shape**: `.claude/fragments/<target-path>/` artifact dirs (`AGENTS.md/`, `CLAUDE.md/`, nested e.g. `plugin/scripts/install-binary.sh/`), each holding `*.fragment.md|sh` local prose + `layout.toml`. layout.toml is `fragments = [...]` FIRST — string entries are local names or `cc-skills:<name>` imports, parameterized entries are `{ use = "...", args = {...} }` inline tables — with `[sources.*]` tables LAST if present at all (top-level keys after a table header nest inside it; ErrFragmentsNested hard-errors on the wrong order; the baked default alias cc-skills → `github:yasyf/cc-skills//guides@main` needs no [sources] table).

**Banner v2 + check**: `cc-guides <ver> src=<layout-dir> fragments=<alias>@<sha12>[,...] | GENERATED ...` (`fragments=none` when import-free). `check` is self-pinning — it fetches each artifact's own banner pins and stamps the banner strings verbatim, so old pins verify forever and mixed binary versions coexist. Releases are immutable and never deleted: v0.1.1–0.1.8 are the embed-era binaries that keep any v1-bannered artifact green; v3 is v0.1.9+.

**Maintenance loop**:
- Shared edit → edit `cc-skills/guides/`, push → lint gate → fan-out → repos whose artifacts import the fragment re-render and commit (message carries the new pin). The commit gate is whole-diff: banner-only files ride along inside a content commit; a fully banner-only diff (pin/version-only) is skipped — the banner-freeze property.
- Repo-specific edit → edit `.claude/fragments/<artifact>/`, run `cc-guides render`, commit fragments + artifact together.
- Binary releases dispatch NOTHING (proven live: v0.1.10 → zero fleet activity).
- Direct edits to rendered artifacts are BLOCKED by cc-context plugin 0.9.0 (PreToolUse: banner in first two lines + `.claude/fragments/<path>/layout.toml` stat); fragment/guides edits get a once-per-session render-and-commit-together nudge.
- New repo: append it to cc-skills `fleet.json` or it only gets its weekly-schedule belt.

**State 2026-07-10**: 21/21 fleet repos migrated (`cc-guides migrate`, self-verify byte-identity, zero hand-fixes), v2 banners at 0.1.10/0.1.11, clean-clone verification 21/21 OK, both E2E directions proven (zero-churn release + content propagation through the armed lint gate).

**Deferred**: cc-skills self-migration via `cc-guides init` (its AGENTS.md still carries pre-cc-guides legacy stamps; waits on the repo-bootstrap v0.40.0 session landing) then it joins fleet.json; repo-bootstrap v0.41.0 scaffolds the layout model; delete legacy `init` after both consumers are done; cc-context `plugin/scripts/install-binary.sh` adoption; fleet go 1.26.5 bump (cc-review still 1.26.4) + `check-latest: true` on setup-go; strip the fan-out lint transition guard (cosmetic); re-render skip-log says "code-only cc-guides release" even for pin-only skips (wording, fix on next action-v1 change).

Related: [[capt-hook-cc-context-wiring]], [[cc-context-architecture]].
